# pangolin_idp (Resource)

Manages a Pangolin OIDC Identity Provider.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pangolin_idp" "example" {
  name            = "my-oidc-idp"
  client_id       = "my-client-id"
  client_secret   = var.oidc_client_secret
  auth_url        = "https://auth.example.com/authorize"
  token_url       = "https://auth.example.com/token"
  identifier_path = "sub"
  scopes          = "openid email profile"
  email_path      = "email"
  auto_provision  = true
}

output "redirect_url" {
  value = pangolin_idp.example.redirect_url
}
```

## Import

```shell
terraform import pangolin_idp.example <idp_id>
```

Note: `client_secret` cannot be recovered after import and must be set manually.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `auth_url` (String) The OIDC authorization URL.
- `client_id` (String) The OIDC client ID.
- `client_secret` (String, Sensitive) The OIDC client secret.
- `identifier_path` (String) The path in the ID token to use as the user identifier (e.g. `sub`).
- `name` (String) The display name of the IDP.
- `scopes` (String) Space-separated OIDC scopes (e.g. `openid email profile`).
- `token_url` (String) The OIDC token URL.

### Optional

- `auto_provision` (Boolean) Whether to auto-provision users on first login. Defaults to `false`.
- `email_path` (String) The path in the ID token for the user email.
- `name_path` (String) The path in the ID token for the user display name.
- `tags` (String) Optional tags associated with the IDP.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The numeric IDP ID.
- `redirect_url` (String) The OAuth callback URL to configure in your OIDC provider.
